ValidationRule.description: Please fill Action Taken , Primary Customer Issue and Internal Comments when NPS case is closed.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(RecordType.DeveloperName ='Customer_Survey_Index', ISCHANGED(Status), TEXT(Status)='Closed', OR (ISBLANK( TEXT(CLF_AT__c )),ISNULL(TEXT(CLF_AT__c))), OR (ISBLANK( TEXT(CLF_PCI__c )),ISNULL(TEXT(CLF_PCI__c))),OR (ISBLANK( Internal_Comments__c ),ISNULL(Internal_Comments__c)))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please fill Action Taken , Primary Customer Issue and Internal Comments when NPS case is closed.
